__meta__.method: Seed data; replace via scripts/build_backtest.py once historical model probabilities + actual results are aligned.
__meta__.dt_note: DT is Elo-anchored today (player-talent + coaching layer pending the FBref scrape). Its backtest is an Elo-baseline ESTIMATE pending the dedicated worldcup_backtest.py harness — treat as a prior, not a fitted result.

wc2022.note: Approximate retrospective. WC22 in Qatar (winter). Hybrid edges out both inputs on draws. DT ≈ Elo baseline (estimate).

euro2024.note: Approximate retrospective. Euro 2024 in Germany. Market edge largely from knockout upsets the model under-weighted. DT ≈ Elo baseline (estimate).
